reviews.comment: No enticing sales pitch or gimmicks. They're overall great people & Joe is quite the perfectionist. By chance any rare hiccup may come about they'll provide a relatively prompt solution. One of the few places I feel confident I've received what I actually paid for.

reviews.comment: Recently went for a tint job and already has bubbles. Yes I'm sure it's the shop I came in my gloss black coupe

reviewReply.comment:
Hey Ron, we have searched through our schedule and haven't been able to match up names. Are you sure we are the shop that tinted your vehicle? If we did tint your vehicle it will be covered under warranty. Give us a call and let us address this.

[Edited to add: Ron T also left a 1* review for one of our competitors as well. We do not believe him to be a customer of Frederick Window Tinting. Please disregard his rating.]

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNDVxcjB3RRAB

reviewReply.comment: Thanks WFR!
Thanks Jerry!

reviews.comment: Worst tinting job I have ever had done. There are big imperfections and debris throughout the tint. They told me after the tint job that the best I was going to get is a satisfactory tint job because the car had previously been tinted. I have had two different professional tinting shops look at my car and tell me that my tint job is unsatisfactory. Taking my car to frederick window tinting was frustrating and disappointing.

reviewReply.comment: Ben, we were under the impression that you left satisfied with the job. It seemed that you understood the challenge of tinting a 12 year old vehicle with glue that was left on your windows for over 5 yrs. We even waved our normal glue removal charge of $100 and discussed with you what you could expect prior to touching your vehicle. In addition, despite you rolling the windows down earlier than the 3 day minimum drying period, we still replaced the damaged tint free of charge. The other window you had an issue with was replaced as well and you shook my hand and gave me your word you would leave satisfied if it was taking care of. As you are the first of over 200 5-Star social media reviews, I'm truly sorry for your "1-star experience".

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbXVuSjdnRRAB

reviews.comment: By far the best place to get your window tinting done.  They did an amazing job tinting my new 2017 Jeep Gand Cherokee SRT8. This will be my 3rd car I’ve had them tint and I will remain a lifetime customer.  The owners do not just provide the best customer service experience but they make you feel like you are a part of their family.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for joining our family, GeekyGuy =) We appreciate your review!

reviews.comment: I've been following them online for little while now and finally pulled the trigger on a tailight vinyl refresh job. What an awesome family owned business! If you have been thinking about getting something done, don't hesitate like I did. I wish I would have taken it to them sooner.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you Justin! Your kind review means so much to us!

reviews.comment: Frederick Window Tinting is amazing! I'm a repeat customer, so that should be a good indication of the quality of work done.
